data.content: Plan drafted: rip out withWildcardTerminals + canonical * -> shipped; remove auto-force in applyStateToPatch; add named BackendPort.markTerminal(id, targetState, reason) correction path (force=true on kno); route bulk terminal UI through it; close() becomes wrapper; revert/delete the 29311507-era wildcard tests; add tests for the honest design; manual verify bulk-ship on autopilot_no_planning. Docs (AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / docs/DEVELOPING.md) already carry the rule. See full note on knot for file inventory, risks, and out-of-scope.
